M-039.NAME: session-security-hardening
M-039.path: backend/app/users frontend frontend-admin docs/plans/Phase-25.xml docs/security/SESSION-PHASE-25.xml scripts/session-security-smoke.mjs
M-039.owns: Safe auth/session hardening gates for user and admin frontends after UI cleanup, with verified-registration token storage boundaries and compatibility-first migration plan away from fragile client token storage

exports.flow-user-session-smoke: User login, verify-email activation, refresh, logout, and 401 recovery smoke path
exports.flow-admin-session-smoke: Admin login, refresh, logout, and role-gate smoke path
exports.compat-auth-transition: Rollback-aware transition contract for frontend auth storage behavior
exports.static-session-security-gate: Local static smoke gate for cookies, storage, refresh retry, logout cleanup, and blacklist expectations

constraints.constraint-1: Do not break login, register, refresh, logout, Telegram auth, or admin role checks.
constraints.constraint-2: Any auth storage change must include rollback and explicit browser storage verification.
constraints.constraint-3: This phase must run after compact UI flows are stable enough to test real auth behavior.
constraints.constraint-4: Cookie-only behavior changes require explicit operator approval and HTTPS or production-like smoke evidence.
constraints.constraint-5: Phase-28 register must not store tokens before email ownership proof; token storage starts only after verify-email success.

M-039.hotspot: H-025: Session hardening must not break login/register/refresh/logout compatibility during frontend simplification
